purpose: Preserve the full lab list across versions, restore country views, add data audit and changelog, and prevent silent record loss.
master_source: v3 complete lab list + v4.1 schema/UI
consistency_rules: Stable lab IDs must be preserved between releases.
Candidate labs must remain visible unless explicitly filtered out by the user.
Country pages must use normalized country names and aliases.
Removed or added labs must appear in the changelog.
The dataset must be migrated forward, not regenerated from scratch.
